description: PUSH and PULL signals received while a SYNC is in progress MUST be queued and processed after reconciliation, not dropped or rejected with ERROR 0x0006
normative_ref: spec/02-signals.md § SYNC; spec/03-session-lifecycle.md § SYNCING State Detail

steps.comment: Trigger SYNCING state on the implementation.
Sent while the implementation is in SYNCING. MUST be queued, not dropped or rejected.
Expect either a counter-SYNC (if digests differ) or a NUDGE for the queued PUSH (if sync completes quickly). Either way, no ERROR 0x0006.
